creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
My understanding of the code was that it should be created anyway (before and after this change: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/base/head/usr.sbin/bsdinstall/bsdinstall?r1=241902&r2=241901&pathrev=241902 )

This code is run even when immediately escaping to the LiveCD, right?
